dashboardDescription: Welcome to your HealthWise Assistant. Here is a quick overview of global health information.
symptomGuidanceDescription: Enter your symptoms and location to get AI-driven guidance on possible health conditions.
preventiveCareDescription: Get AI-driven, evidence-based information on preventive healthcare measures.
vaccinationsDescription: Get AI-powered vaccination recommendations based on age group.
outbreakAlertsDescription: Stay informed about disease outbreaks in your area. Enter a location to check for current and past alerts.
noActiveAlerts: No active alerts found for the specified location.
settingsDescription: Manage your account and application settings.
notificationsDescription: Configure how you receive notifications from HealthWise.
outbreakAlertsToggleDescription: Receive alerts about disease outbreaks in your area.
healthTipsToggleDescription: Get occasional AI-powered health and wellness tips.
settingsSavedDescription: Your changes have been successfully saved.
enterDisease: Please enter a disease or condition.
enterSymptomsAndLocation: Please enter both symptoms and location.
failedToGetOutbreakAlerts: Failed to get outbreak alerts. Please try again later.
failedToGetAIInfo: Failed to get information from the AI. Please try again later.
failedToGetAIGuidance: Failed to get guidance from the AI. Please try again later.
failedToGetAISchedule: Failed to get the schedule from the AI. Please try again later.
sorrySomethingWentWrong: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
